image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about retrieval practice.
Context visual: It's more than just recalling facts. It shapes how we learn and remember.
Escalation visual: Studies show that actively retrieving information strengthens memory connections.
Evidence visual: One recent study found a 30% boost in recall after retrieval practice sessions.
Pattern Interrupt visual: But not all retrieval is equal. Quality matters!
Payoff visual: Engaging with material over time, like spaced repetition, maximizes the benefits.
Cta visual: Want to improve your memory? Try retrieval practice today!
